body.title: CLOSED: pipeline inference: cursor indicator + prompt/response on console
body.result: on_tier threaded through pipeline to LLMPeerAdvisor and LLMVoiceActor; dim console prints show prompt+response head in tmux (5a8e195b)
body.description:
Two related gaps in the TurnPipeline path:
1. The _on_tier cursor indicator ([→] reasoning (tier.X)) never fires for pipeline turns — it's defined in _process_inner but not threaded into TurnPipeline.run_turn(), LLMPeerAdvisor.respond(), or LLMVoiceActor.render().
2. Akien wants console visibility into LLM prompt+response during inference (to see what's going to the model and what comes back, live in tmux).

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/turn_pipeline.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/llm_peer_advisor.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/voice_ab.py, wild_igor/igor/main.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Add on_tier param to run_turn(); thread to LLMPeerAdvisor and LLMVoiceActor; add optional console print of prompt head + response head in each LLM caller. Out of scope: streaming (Ollama is non-streaming).
**Test plan:** Visual verification: web message shows [→] reasoning (cloud/interactive) in tmux during inference.
